title: Lords of the Expanse
content:

{{Quote|Lifestyles of the Rich and Dangerous|''Lords of the Expanse'' tagline|<ref name="Lords of the Expanse">''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''</ref>}}
'''''Lords of the Expanse''''' is a boxed set supplement for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The set provides players with [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] adventure scenarios in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] against the backdrop of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was written by [[Paul Sudlow]] and [[Chris Doyle]], and published by [[West End Games]] in [[August]] [[1997]].

The full ''Lords of the Expanse'' Campaign Setting includes the ''Sector Guide'', the ''Gamemaster Guide'', the ''Campaign Guide'', a character template booklet, a Tapani [[Sector/Legends|sector]] poster map, and twelve full-color character cards. Two additional ''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'' books from West End Games, ''[[Player's Guide to Tapani]]'' and ''[[Tapani Sector Instant Adventures]]'', provide supplementary material for ''Lords of the Expanse''.

{{Book-stub}}

==Continuity==
''Lords of the Expanse'' is set in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].<ref name="Date">The ''Lords of the Expanse Sector Guide'' notes that the campaign setting begins in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], which corresponds to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref>
